profiles.description: Parent or product repository with a full adoption and contribution journey.
Runnable public product or documentation application.
Primary package with its own adoption journey, examples, and compatibility surface.
Focused package whose README may stay short when the package guide carries depth.

examples: ## Quick start — your first agent, no key required

commands.command:
npm install @agentskit/memory better-sqlite3
# For production:  npm install redis
# For vectors:     npm install vectra

exceptions.reason: Public app README uses textual navigation and links to the live site; the monorepo logo lives on the product surface rather than a local package image.
Zero local content images by design for concise monorepo app READMEs that defer visuals to the deployed site.
